text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I decide to watch Air Groove as she
does some solo dance practice.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: One, two, three, four. One, two, three, four!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's dance skills are, unsurprisingly, top
notch. However...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Is there something you'd like to say?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If something is on your mind, speak up. You're
not holding back because you're afraid, are you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears that the hesitation I'm feeling is as
clear as day to her.
choice_data_list: Your dance could use a bit more oomph.

Your routine could do with a bit more
sophistication.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh? Well, that's a bold piece of criticism.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Very well, I'll bite. Explain yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain what aspects of the dance could be
expressed with more energy and power.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Your reasoning is sound enough.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Not so fast!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I have to put your advice into practice. Your job
is to stay here until it's been properly executed.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Your eyes had better be glued to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the end of the session, Air Groove is putting
far more power into her dance, thus improving
her routine.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Sophistication? That's not a word you'd use
without a good reason.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You need to be more specific. I'm assuming you
have something in mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain what aspects of the dance could be
expressed with more finesse and grace.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph. I see what you mean. Not a bad idea.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't get too pleased with yourself just yet, you
dunce!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to implement your advice, and I expect
a full dissection of my performance after.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your job is to point out any flaws and help me
achieve perfection. Don't blink!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Then let's get started.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the end of the session, Air Groove is instilling
more intent into her dance, thus improving her
routine.
